title: Infosys Receives INR 7,49,10,389 Penalty Order From Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited disclosed that it received communication for collection of a penalty from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial taxes. The total penalty is INR 7,49,10,389/-. The demand relates to alleged non-realization or delay in realization of export proceeds, availment of ineligible ITC, and other issues including RCM, import of services, sale of investments, staff welfare expense, and write-off cases of exports for FY 2021-22. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of penalty from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial taxes.

The demand relates to alleged non- realization/delay in realization of export proceeds, availment of ineligible ITC and other issues like RCM, import of services, sale of investments, staff welfare expense and write off cases of exports for the FY 2021-22.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
